stemHtml: On the ground, wind, jet blast or rotor wash can blow slush or snow onto the aircraft which...

options.a: May deposit on the aircraft surfaces and freeze, and ground de-icing and anti-icing may be necessary before take-off.
options.b: May deposit on the aircraft surfaces and freeze, but the contamination will be removed if the in-flight de-icing system is turned on.
options.c: Does NOT pose a safety hazard as it tends to drop off the aircraft surface, which remains uncontaminated.
options.d: Will blow away during the take-off run, but the aircraft de-icing and anti-icing systems should be turned ON as a precaution.
